idea-plugin.name: Clear App Storage Before Deploy
idea-plugin.description:
Clear App Storage Before Deploy

Adds a convenient toggle button to the main toolbar that controls Android Studio's built-in "Clear app storage before deployment" option in the Run/Debug Configuration.

No more navigating through Run Configuration settings every time you need to toggle this flag — just click the toolbar button.

Features

  • One-click toggle directly from the main toolbar
  • Controls the native Android Studio "Clear app storage before deployment" setting
  • Visual icon change indicates current state (enabled/disabled)
  • Works with any Android App run configuration
  • Supports both new and classic UI

Usage

  1. Look for the toggle button in the right side of the main toolbar
  2. Click to toggle clearing app storage on or off
  3. The icon changes to reflect the current state
  4. Run your app — storage will be cleared automatically before deployment when enabled
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Toolbar toggle for "Clear app storage before deployment" flag
  • Support for new UI and classic UI toolbars

action.description: Toggle clearing app storage before each deployment
